name: Dialpad AI-Powered Phone API
what_it_does: Dialpad API for AI-powered business communications platform. Dialpad includes built-in AI transcription, call summaries, and real-time coaching. API enables access to calls, transcripts, AI summaries, contacts, and analytics — making it especially valuable for AI agents seeking structured call intelligence data.
use_cases: Retrieving AI call transcripts and summaries from sales coaching automation agents
Querying call analytics and team performance from business reporting agents
Accessing contact and call history from CRM integration agents
Monitoring real-time call sentiment data from customer success agents
not_for: High-volume outbound dialing (Dialpad is business UCaaS, not a power dialer)
best_when: A sales or support team using Dialpad wants AI agents to leverage Dialpad's built-in AI transcripts and call intelligence — extracting structured insights without needing separate transcription services.
avoid_when: You need complex multi-channel contact center routing. PRIVACY: Call transcripts and AI summaries contain sensitive business conversation data.

auth.notes: Dialpad OAuth 2.0 for user-authorized access. API keys for service integrations. Developer access via Dialpad developer portal.

pricing.notes: Dialpad subscription required. API access included with Pro and Enterprise plans.

performance.rate_limits: Dialpad API rate limits documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: AI call transcripts and summaries contain sensitive business conversations
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
AI transcription accuracy varies by audio quality and accent
Call recording and transcription requires consent per jurisdiction
API access may require Pro or Enterprise plan
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: AI call transcripts with sensitive business conversations. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA-eligible. Transcription data requires careful access controls.

security_score_components.security_notes: AI call transcripts are sensitive business data. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA eligible. Consent required for recording/transcription.
